mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_message (id, conversation_id, user_id, role, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, role, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM rag_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
